<!--
Thanks for the PR. Please fill in the sections below.

Small, focused PRs land faster. If this is a refactor, a price-table update,
or a bug fix, follow the guidance in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. The "why" matters more than the "what" — the diff already tells me the what. -->

## Issue(s) closed

<!-- e.g. Closes #42. If this doesn't close anything, write "n/a". -->

Closes #

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds capability)
- [ ] Refactor (no observable behavior change)
- [ ] Docs (README, docs/**, inline comments)
- [ ] Chore (build, CI, repo hygiene, dependencies)
- [ ] Release (version bump + CHANGELOG cut)

## Testing

<!-- Tick what you ran. -->

- [ ] Smoke test passes locally (the synthetic-hook invocation from `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] Pester tests pass (once M3-01 lands and `tests/` exists)
- [ ] CI is green (once M3-03 lands and `.github/workflows/` runs on PRs)
- [ ] Manual reproduction confirms the bug is fixed (for bug-fix PRs)

## CHANGELOG.md entry

- [ ] I added a bullet under `[Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] I deliberately did **not** add a `CHANGELOG.md` entry, because: <!-- explain (e.g., docs-only change, internal-only refactor, repo-hygiene PR) -->

## Screenshots

<!-- If this PR changes the rendered status line, the dashboard, or any other
visible output, paste a before/after screenshot (or copy-paste the rendered
text from a terminal that preserves color). Skip this section otherwise. -->
